requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (IRAM / IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（IRAM / IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（IRAM / IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED lamps and luminaires in Argentina is addressed through IRAM standards adopting IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which classifies products into risk groups RG0 (Exempt) to RG3 (High risk) based on blue-light-weighted radiance/irradiance. Where the safety certification scheme (S-mark, Resolucion 169/2018 et seq.) or the specific product standard invokes IEC 62471, a risk-group assessment must be documented as part of the product's technical evidence. There is no separate EU-style mandatory blue-light-class consumer label requirement; the obligation, where it applies, is to assess and document the risk group within the certification, not necessarily to print a blue-light class on packaging. Verify whether the certifier requires IEC 62471 evidence for the specific lamp/luminaire type and any RG2/RG3 usage-restriction handling.
summary.zh: 阿根廷 LED 灯及灯具的光生物安全通过采用 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）的 IRAM 标准处理，依据蓝光加权辐亮度/辐照度将产品划分为 RG0（豁免）至 RG3（高危险）的危险组别。当安全认证方案（S 标志，Resolucion 169/2018 及后续规定）或具体产品标准援引 IEC 62471 时，须将危险组别评估作为产品技术证据的一部分予以记录。不存在欧盟式单独的强制性蓝光等级消费者标签要求；适用时的义务是在认证内评估并记录危险组别，而非必然在包装上印制蓝光等级。请核实认证机构是否对具体灯/灯具类型要求 IEC 62471 证据，以及任何 RG2/RG3 使用限制的处理。
summary.zht: 阿根廷 LED 燈及燈具的光生物安全通過採用 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）的 IRAM 標準處理，依據藍光加權輻亮度/輻照度將產品劃分為 RG0（豁免）至 RG3（高危險）的危險組別。當安全認證方案（S 標誌，Resolucion 169/2018 及後續規定）或具體產品標準援引 IEC 62471 時，須將危險組別評估作為產品技術證據的一部分予以記錄。不存在歐盟式單獨的強制性藍光等級消費者標籤要求；適用時的義務是在認證內評估並記錄危險組別，而非必然在包裝上印製藍光等級。請核實認證機構是否對具體燈/燈具類型要求 IEC 62471 證據，以及任何 RG2/RG3 使用限制的處理。

standards_or_laws: IRAM-adopted IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (risk group classification RG0-RG3)
Resolucion 169/2018 (Secretaria de Comercio) — S-mark electrical-safety scheme (technical evidence basis where IEC 62471 is invoked)

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. It is a recommended standard (GB/T) and not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in China; enforcement for residential luminaires is limited. So a CN-compliant product may have a GB/T 20145 risk-group assessment available, but it is not consistently mandated and is not recognised by the Argentine scheme.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。其为推荐性标准（GB/T），并非对所有中国 LED 灯具均强制；对居民灯具的执行有限。因此符合中国标准的产品可能具备 GB/T 20145 危险组别评估，但并非一贯强制，且不被阿根廷方案认可。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。其為推薦性標準（GB/T），並非對所有中國 LED 燈具均強制；對居民燈具的執行有限。因此符合中國標準的產品可能具備 GB/T 20145 危險組別評估，但並非一貫強制，且不被阿根廷方案認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, equivalent to IEC 62471:2006)

gap.en: Both China (GB/T 20145) and Argentina (IRAM-adopted IEC 62471) derive their photobiological method from IEC 62471, so the technical assessment is largely transferable in content. The difference is in status and route: GB/T 20145 is recommended-only in China, while in Argentina an IEC 62471 risk-group assessment may be required as technical evidence within the S-mark certification where the scheme or product standard invokes it. There is no separate Argentine mandatory blue-light consumer-label requirement equivalent to the EU's, so the obligation is documentation within certification rather than label artwork. A Chinese exporter with an existing GB/T 20145 risk-group report has useful supporting data, but should obtain or restate the assessment under the IRAM-adopted IEC 62471 edition as required by the Argentine certifier, and handle any RG2/RG3 warnings per the certifier's instructions.
gap.zh: 中国（GB/T 20145）与阿根廷（采用 IEC 62471 的 IRAM 标准）的光生物方法均源自 IEC 62471，故技术评估内容大致可转用。差异在于地位与路径：GB/T 20145 在中国仅为推荐性，而在阿根廷，当方案或产品标准援引时，IEC 62471 危险组别评估可能须作为 S 标志认证内的技术证据。阿根廷无相当于欧盟的单独强制性蓝光消费者标签要求，故义务为认证内的文件记录而非标签图样。持有现行 GB/T 20145 危险组别报告的中国出口商具备有用的支持数据，但应按阿根廷认证机构要求依采用 IEC 62471 的 IRAM 版本取得或重述评估，并按认证机构指示处理任何 RG2/RG3 警示。
gap.zht: 中國（GB/T 20145）與阿根廷（採用 IEC 62471 的 IRAM 標準）的光生物方法均源自 IEC 62471，故技術評估內容大致可轉用。差異在於地位與路徑：GB/T 20145 在中國僅為推薦性，而在阿根廷，當方案或產品標準援引時，IEC 62471 危險組別評估可能須作為 S 標誌認證內的技術證據。阿根廷無相當於歐盟的單獨強制性藍光消費者標籤要求，故義務為認證內的文件記錄而非標籤圖樣。持有現行 GB/T 20145 危險組別報告的中國出口商具備有用的支持數據，但應按阿根廷認證機構要求依採用 IEC 62471 的 IRAM 版本取得或重述評估，並按認證機構指示處理任何 RG2/RG3 警示。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — IEC 62471 risk-group assessment may be required as technical evidence within the S-mark certification where the scheme or product standard invokes it; no separate EU-style mandatory blue-light consumer label
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is limited

source.publisher: IRAM (Instituto Argentino de Normalizacion y Certificacion)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological safety in Argentina is addressed via IRAM-adopted IEC 62471 risk-group classification, required as technical evidence within the S-mark certification where invoked, rather than via an EU-style mandatory blue-light consumer label. The method overlaps with China's GB/T 20145-2006 (recommended), but Chinese reports are not recognised by the Argentine scheme. Manufacturers should obtain or restate the IEC 62471 risk-group assessment under the IRAM edition and handle RG2/RG3 warnings per the certifier. Verify whether the certifier requires this evidence for the specific product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷的光生物安全通过采用 IEC 62471 的 IRAM 危险组别分类处理，在被援引时须作为 S 标志认证内的技术证据，而非通过欧盟式强制性蓝光消费者标签。该方法与中国 GB/T 20145-2006（推荐性）重叠，但中国报告不被阿根廷方案认可。制造商应按 IRAM 版本取得或重述 IEC 62471 危险组别评估，并按认证机构处理 RG2/RG3 警示。请核实认证机构是否对具体产品要求该证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷的光生物安全通過採用 IEC 62471 的 IRAM 危險組別分類處理，在被援引時須作為 S 標誌認證內的技術證據，而非通過歐盟式強制性藍光消費者標籤。該方法與中國 GB/T 20145-2006（推薦性）重疊，但中國報告不被阿根廷方案認可。制造商應按 IRAM 版本取得或重述 IEC 62471 危險組別評估，並按認證機構處理 RG2/RG3 警示。請核實認證機構是否對具體產品要求該證據。

requirement_topic.en: Spanish-Language Marking, Warnings and Product Information
requirement_topic.zh: 西班牙语标识、警示及产品信息
requirement_topic.zht: 西班牙語標識、警示及產品信息

summary.en: Products placed on the Argentine market, including LED lamps and luminaires, must carry marking, safety warnings, and consumer information in Spanish. This is reinforced by Argentina's consumer-protection framework (Ley 24.240 de Defensa del Consumidor) and the labelling/marking obligations attached to the S-safety mark certification and the energy-efficiency label. Required Spanish-language information typically includes the importer/responsible party identification (with CUIT), rated voltage/frequency (220 V, 50 Hz), wattage and key ratings, safety warnings, and, where applicable, photobiological-safety usage warnings for higher risk-group products. The Spanish-language requirement applies to packaging, instructions, and the mandatory label graphics; English-only or Chinese-only marking is not sufficient for market placement.
summary.zh: 在阿根廷市场销售的产品（含 LED 灯及灯具）须以西班牙语标示标识、安全警示及消费者信息。这由阿根廷消费者保护框架（Ley 24.240 消费者保护法）及附属于 S 安全标志认证和能效标签的标识/标示义务所强化。所需西班牙语信息通常包括进口商/责任方标识（含 CUIT）、额定电压/频率（220 V、50 Hz）、瓦数及关键参数、安全警示，以及（如适用）较高危险组别产品的光生物安全使用警示。西班牙语要求适用于包装、说明书及强制性标签图样；仅英文或仅中文标识不足以满足市场准入。
summary.zht: 在阿根廷市場銷售的產品（含 LED 燈及燈具）須以西班牙語標示標識、安全警示及消費者信息。這由阿根廷消費者保護框架（Ley 24.240 消費者保護法）及附屬於 S 安全標誌認證和能效標籤的標識/標示義務所強化。所需西班牙語信息通常包括進口商/責任方標識（含 CUIT）、額定電壓/頻率（220 V、50 Hz）、瓦數及關鍵參數、安全警示，以及（如適用）較高危險組別產品的光生物安全使用警示。西班牙語要求適用於包裝、說明書及強制性標籤圖樣；僅英文或僅中文標識不足以滿足市場准入。

standards_or_laws: Ley 24.240 — Defensa del Consumidor (Argentine consumer-protection law; Spanish-language information obligations)
Labelling/marking obligations attached to the S-safety mark and the energy-efficiency label (Secretaria de Comercio / Secretaria de Energia)

summary.en: In China, product marking and instructions for the domestic market are in Chinese, governed by GB 7000.1 / CCC marking rules, the China Energy Label (CEL) marking, and the China RoHS disclosure label (SJ/T 11364-2014). The marking content overlaps in substance (voltage, wattage, safety warnings) but is in Chinese and references Chinese identifiers (e.g., CCC mark, CEL), none of which satisfies the Argentine Spanish-language and importer-identification requirements.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向国内市场的产品标识及说明书为中文，受 GB 7000.1／CCC 标识规则、中国能效标识（CEL）标注及中国 RoHS 披露标识（SJ/T 11364-2014）规范。标识内容在实质上重叠（电压、瓦数、安全警示），但为中文并引用中国标识（如 CCC 标志、CEL），均不满足阿根廷西班牙语及进口商标识要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向國內市場的產品標識及說明書為中文，受 GB 7000.1／CCC 標識規則、中國能效標識（CEL）標註及中國 RoHS 披露標識（SJ/T 11364-2014）規範。標識內容在實質上重疊（電壓、瓦數、安全警示），但為中文並引用中國標識（如 CCC 標誌、CEL），均不滿足阿根廷西班牙語及進口商標識要求。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label (CEL) marking; SJ/T 11364-2014 China RoHS disclosure label (Chinese-language)

gap.en: China-market products are marked in Chinese with Chinese identifiers (CCC, CEL, China RoHS label), which do not satisfy Argentine requirements. For Argentina the manufacturer/importer must (1) re-do all marking, warnings, and instructions in Spanish; (2) add the in-country importer/responsible-party identification with CUIT; (3) show the S-safety mark, the energy-efficiency label, and (for smart products) the ENACOM identification; (4) include any RG2/RG3 photobiological usage warnings in Spanish where applicable. This is largely a translation, label-artwork, and importer-identification task rather than a product re-engineering one, but it is mandatory and must be in place before customs clearance and sale. The Chinese marking content is a useful source for the substance, but cannot be reused as-is.
gap.zh: 中国市场产品以中文及中国标识（CCC、CEL、中国 RoHS 标识）标示，不满足阿根廷要求。对阿根廷，制造商/进口商须：（1）以西班牙语重做全部标识、警示及说明书；（2）加注持 CUIT 的境内进口商/责任方标识；（3）标示 S 安全标志、能效标签，及（对智能产品）ENACOM 标识；（4）如适用，以西班牙语纳入任何 RG2/RG3 光生物使用警示。这主要是翻译、标签图样及进口商标识工作，而非产品重新工程，但为强制要求，须在清关及销售前到位。中国标识内容可作实质来源，但不可原样重用。
gap.zht: 中國市場產品以中文及中國標識（CCC、CEL、中國 RoHS 標識）標示，不滿足阿根廷要求。對阿根廷，制造商/進口商須：（1）以西班牙語重做全部標識、警示及說明書；（2）加註持 CUIT 的境內進口商/責任方標識；（3）標示 S 安全標誌、能效標籤，及（對智能產品）ENACOM 標識；（4）如適用，以西班牙語納入任何 RG2/RG3 光生物使用警示。這主要是翻譯、標籤圖樣及進口商標識工作，而非產品重新工程，但為強制要求，須在清關及銷售前到位。中國標識內容可作實質來源，但不可原樣重用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Spanish-language marking, warnings, and importer identification (CUIT) required for market placement under consumer-protection and labelling obligations (Ley 24.240 and S-mark/energy-label marking rules)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (Chinese-language) — Chinese marking under GB 7000.1/CCC, CEL, and China RoHS disclosure label for the CN domestic market

source.publisher: Direccion Nacional de Defensa del Consumidor (Argentina)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentina requires Spanish-language marking, safety warnings, importer identification (CUIT), and the mandatory label graphics (S-safety mark, energy-efficiency label, and ENACOM identification for smart products) before market placement, reinforced by consumer-protection law (Ley 24.240). Chinese-language CCC/CEL/China-RoHS marking does not satisfy this. The task is primarily translation, label-artwork, and importer identification rather than product re-engineering, but it is mandatory before customs clearance and sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷在上市前要求西班牙语标识、安全警示、进口商标识（CUIT）及强制性标签图样（S 安全标志、能效标签，及智能产品的 ENACOM 标识），并由消费者保护法（Ley 24.240）强化。中文 CCC/CEL/中国 RoHS 标识不满足该要求。该工作主要是翻译、标签图样及进口商标识，而非产品重新工程，但在清关及销售前为强制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷在上市前要求西班牙語標識、安全警示、進口商標識（CUIT）及強制性標籤圖樣（S 安全標誌、能效標籤，及智能產品的 ENACOM 標識），並由消費者保護法（Ley 24.240）強化。中文 CCC/CEL/中國 RoHS 標識不滿足該要求。該工作主要是翻譯、標籤圖樣及進口商標識，而非產品重新工程，但在清關及銷售前為強制要求。
